steps.title: Use the triangle angle sum
steps.content:
The interior angles shown are $31^\circ$, $2b^\circ$, and $a^\circ$. Since $a=45$, the angle sum gives
$$
31+2b+45=180
$$

steps.title: Isolate the unknown angle
steps.content:
Combine constants, then isolate $b$ by subtracting $76$ and dividing by $2$.
$$
76+2b=180
$$
$$
2b=104
$$
$$
b=52
$$

steps.title: Use the requested value
steps.content: The requested value is $b$, not $2b$, here. The answer is A.
